scripts.build: pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/protocol build && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/mcp-server build && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/desktop build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/protocol build && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/mcp-server check && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/desktop check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/protocol build && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/protocol test && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/mcp-server test && pnpm --filter @codex-3d-pet/desktop test
